raw_description:
This 4-star resort offers an outdoor pool and tennis court, right next to the beach. Set in green gardens, it is 20 minutes’ drive from Dubai International Airport. Private parking is free.

Balconies are included in all rooms at Sharjah Carlton Hotel. Each comes with satellite TV, minibar and tea/coffee maker. Air conditioning and private bathrooms are standard in all units.

Guests can work out at the fitness centre or relax in Sharjah Carlton’s sauna.

It is 15 km from Dubai Creek Golf and Yacht Club.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it8.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at Sharjah Carlton Hotel. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Outdoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Beachfront.
